overrides.override_summary: PA law may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisee may have broader protections under CA Franchise Investment Law and CA Franchise Relations Act

overrides.override_summary: PA forum and arbitration may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisee may be able to litigate/arbitrate in CA

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA law disfavors noncompete agreements; post-term restriction may be void

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes claims under CA Franchise Investment Law (§31512) and CA Franchise Relations Act (§20010)
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains statutory rights despite signing release at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Maximum interest rate in CA is 10% annually
overrides.why_it_matters: FA late payment rate of 1.5%/month (18% annual) exceeds CA cap; only 10% enforceable

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages clause may be unenforceable under CA Civil Code §1671
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisor's formula-based liquidated damages at termination may not be collectible in CA

overrides.override_summary: GNC will not enforce non-solicitation of employees (§22.B FA, §13.2 ADA) in CA
overrides.why_it_matters: Employees free to move between GNC franchisees and franchisor in CA

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes claims under Hawaii Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory franchise law protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Termination/non-renewal/transfer provisions only applicable to extent not inconsistent with HI Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: State law may override FA termination triggers

overrides.override_summary: IL law governs IL franchise relationship; venue may not be limited to PA
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisee likely litigates in IL

overrides.override_summary: Release may not waive rights under IL Franchise Disclosure Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory protections preserved at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Provisions subject to Indiana Franchise Act
overrides.why_it_matters: IN requires good cause for termination and additional protections

overrides.override_summary: General release as condition of renewal/transfer may not require release of claims under MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisee retains statutory claims

overrides.override_summary: Must have good cause for termination; 90 days notice in some cases
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisee has enhanced termination protections

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination (60 days to cure); 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly extends cure/notice periods vs. FA standard 30 days

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require litigation/arbitration outside MN; cannot require jury waiver; cannot require liquidated damages/termination penalties/judgment notes
overrides.why_it_matters: Nullifies PA forum, jury waiver, liquidated damages, and confession of judgment in MN

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes claims under MN Statutes 80C.01-80C.22
overrides.why_it_matters: Full statutory protection preserved

overrides.override_summary: Consent to transfer will not be unreasonably withheld
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits franchisor discretion on transfers

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes claims under NY GBL Article 33, §§680-695
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Choice of law/forum not waiver of rights under NY GBL Article 33
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisee retains NY statutory rights regardless of PA choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate on any grounds available by law
overrides.why_it_matters: Expands franchisee termination rights beyond FA

overrides.override_summary: PA forum may be subject to ND law; cannot waive rights under ND franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisee may litigate locally

overrides.override_summary: Release subject to RI Franchise Investment Act §19-28.1-14
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Release subject to SD franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Release subject to VA Retail Franchising Act §13.1-564
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration must be in WA or mutually agreed location; litigation may be brought in WA
overrides.why_it_matters: Nullifies PA forum requirement for WA franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes rights under WA Franchise Investment Protection Act; only valid in negotiated settlement with independent counsel
overrides.why_it_matters: Strongest release protection — requires independent counsel

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete void unless employee earns >$100K/year annualized (adjusted for inflation); independent contractor >$250K
overrides.why_it_matters: Most GNC store employees likely below threshold — noncompete void for them

overrides.override_summary: Franchisor prohibited from restricting franchisee from soliciting/hiring employees of other franchisees or franchisor (RCW 49.62.060)
overrides.why_it_matters: Employee mobility fully protected in WA

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees collectible only to extent reflecting reasonable actual/estimated costs; initial fees deferred until pre-opening obligations met and store is open
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits transfer fee to cost basis; protects franchisee from paying fees before receiving value
